nodes.context: English criminal organisation based in Clerkenwell, London, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and murder.
London-based gang involved in extortion and violence; former enforcer Frankie Fraser was shot in 1991.
Jamaican-origin gangs involved in drug trafficking; Tommy Adams established connections with them.
South American drug trafficking organizations; Tommy Adams gained an $80 million credit line from them.
General reference to drug cartels from South America; the Adams family has connections with them.

edges.context: The Adams family allegedly ordered the shooting of Frankie Fraser, a former enforcer for the Richardson Gang.
Tommy Adams established connections with numerous Yardie gangs for criminal cooperation.
Tommy Adams gained an $80 million credit line from Colombian drug cartels, indicating a financial partnership.
The Adams family is believed to have connections with South American drug cartels for drug trafficking.
